name: KnowledgeGraphTool
responsibility: Query and update the knowledge graph via the /knowledge API

name: EntityExtractorTool
responsibility: Extract named entities and relations from raw text

name: CypherQueryTool
responsibility: Execute Cypher queries against the KuzuDB graph backend

name: IntelligenceAuditTool
responsibility: Run the full Bayesian audit pipeline on a news report

name: ProbabilityTreeTool
responsibility: Build and retrieve probability trees for alternative interpretations

name: ReasoningPathTool
responsibility: Record, finalize and retrieve causal reasoning paths

name: OrderCriticTool
responsibility: Score and filter knowledge triples by civilizational significance

name: IncrementalExtractorTool
responsibility: Delta-update the KG with conflict detection and entity disambiguation

name: CausalChainTool
responsibility: Extract multi-step causal chains from news text

name: EntityResolverTool
responsibility: Deduplicate and canonicalize entities using fuzzy matching

name: OntologyContextTool
responsibility: Extract ontology-grounded context from KuzuDB for reasoning

name: SacredSwordTool
responsibility: Run the 4-step sacred-sword ontological reasoning analysis

name: ProvenanceTool
responsibility: Retrieve relationship and entity provenance audit trails

name: HierarchicalGraphTool
responsibility: Return degree-filtered hierarchical graph for visualization
